justification: The diff correctly updates dependencies to Jakarta EE 10 / Spring 6 / Hibernate 6 and migrates javax.* imports to jakarta.*. It uses modern Maven compiler settings (<release>), replaces deprecated WebMvcConfigurerAdapter with WebMvcConfigurer, and adopts Spring Security 6 lambda DSL. However, it retains the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with a manual migration comment instead of fully removing it, and uses @Serial annotations correctly but misses some minor cleanups (e.g., Integer.valueOf instead of new Integer). The diff is coherent with no spurious churn.
